explanation: Conversation topics have drifted from the stated objective
conversation_text: Hey B, good sprint retrospective today? We crushed that feature rollout, right? I mean, the client loved it. Uh, yeah, sorta. But man, those bugs at the end... We spent half the sprint firefighting. What'd you think? Totally agree on the bugs. That's why I pushed so hard for more QA time upfront. Remember? I said from day one we needed dedicated testing cycles instead of squeezing it in. Wait, you did? I thought you were all about 'move fast and break things.' Like, last retro you were complaining QA slowed us down. Nah, I mean... yeah, I get why it felt that way, but I was talking about inefficient QA, not cutting it out. Anyway, this time it bit us hard.
